title: Apologizing simply
subtitle: Say sorry and give a short reason.
overview: Say sorry and give a short reason.
Read the English aloud, understand the Chinese, then answer with your own real information.

sections.title: A1 focus
rows: Sorry I am late. The bus was late.
不好意思我迟到了。公交晚点了。

items.en: Sorry I am late. The bus was late.
items.zh: 不好意思我迟到了。公交晚点了。

items.en: Now make one sentence about your real life.
items.zh: 现在造一个关于你真实生活的句子。

items.en: Read it aloud three times: slow, clear, natural.

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Sorry I am late. The bus was late.
lines.zh: 不好意思我迟到了。公交晚点了。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say it one more time, slowly?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Sorry I am late. The bus was late.
lines.zh: 不好意思我迟到了。公交晚点了。

items.en: Change one word and say it again.
Use the sentence today if you can.
items.zh: 如果可以，今天就使用这个句子。
